title: Pin requests dependency to fix CVE-2025-12345
description: Pins the requests library to version 2.31.1 which patches a known redirect vulnerability (CVE-2025-12345).
diff:
diff --git a/requirements.txt b/requirements.txt
index 1a2b3c4..d5e6f7a 100644
--- a/requirements.txt
+++ b/requirements.txt
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ flask==3.0.0
 pydantic==2.5.0
 sqlalchemy==2.0.23
 alembic==1.13.0
-requests>=2.28.0
+requests==2.31.1
 pytest==7.4.3
 gunicorn==21.2.0
comments: security-bot: CVE-2025-12345 affects requests <2.31.1. Pinning is recommended.
george: Good catch, merging this quickly.
author: hannah
